controls.control_objective: To ensure endeavour to migrate to latest security standards
controls.control_description: However, they shall endeavour to migrate to latest security standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to endeavour to migrate to latest security standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure prevail
controls.control_description:
In case of any discrepancy in applicability of guidelines, the instructions provided in this Master
Direction shall prevail.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prevail

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (cyber resilience and digital payment security controls for non-bank psos) master directions, 2024 (master directi
controls.control_description:
These Master Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Cyber Resilience
and Digital Payment Security Controls for non-bank PSOs) Master Directions, 2024 (Master
Directions, Directions).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (cyber resilience and digital payment security controls for non-bank psos) master directions, 2024 (master directi

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the rbi
controls.control_description:
The Directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website
of the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be applicable as hitherto
controls.control_description:
In order to provide adequate time to put in place the necessary compliance
structure, a phased implementation approach1 is prescribed as under -
Regulated Entity Timeline Large non-bank PSOs2 April 1, 2025 Medium non-bank PSOs3 April 1, 2026 Small non-bank PSOs4 April 1, 2028
1 The timelines prescribed in the instructions issued earlier by RBI shall continue to be applicable as hitherto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be applicable as hitherto

controls.control_objective: To ensure be
controls.control_description: For instance, if a small (or medium) PPI issuer moves into medium category (or large), it will need to comply with these Directions within a period of two (or one) years from the time of new categorisation, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to all authorised non-bank psos
controls.control_description: The provisions of these Directions shall apply to all authorised non-bank PSOs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to all authorised non-bank psos

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure adherence to these directions by such unregulated entities as well
controls.control_description:
To effectively identify, monitor, control and manage cyber and technology related risks
arising out of linkages of PSOs with unregulated entities who are part of their digital payments
ecosystem (like payment gateways, third party service providers, vendors, etc.), PSOs shall
ensure adherence to these Directions by such unregulated entities as well, subject to mutual
agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure adherence to these directions by such unregulated entities as well

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place
controls.control_description:
An organisational policy in this respect, approved by the Board, shall be put in
place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for ensuring adequate oversight over information security risks, including cyber risk and cyber resilience
controls.control_description:
The Board of Directors (Board) of the PSO shall be responsible for ensuring adequate
oversight over information security risks, including cyber risk and cyber resilience.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for ensuring adequate oversight over information security risks, including cyber risk and cyber resilience

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet at least once every quarter
controls.control_description:
However, primary oversight may be delegated to a sub-committee of the Board, headed
by a member with experience in information / cyber security, which shall meet at least
once every quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet at least once every quarter

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a board approved information security (is) policy to manage potential information security risks covering all applications and products conc
controls.control_description:
The PSO shall formulate a Board approved Information Security (IS) policy to manage
potential information security risks covering all applications and products concerning
payment systems as well as management of risks that have materialised.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate a board approved information security (is) policy to manage potential information security risks covering all applications and products conc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed annually
controls.control_description:
The policy shall
be reviewed annually.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed annually

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover at the minimum, (i) roles and responsibilities of board / sub-committees of the board, senior management and other key personnel
controls.control_description:
It shall cover at the minimum, (i) roles and responsibilities of Board
/ sub-committees of the Board, senior management and other key personnel;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover at the minimum, (i) roles and responsibilities of board / sub-committees of the board, senior management and other key personnel

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include various types of security controls for ensuring cyber resiliency along with processes for training and awareness of employees / stakehold
controls.control_description:
(ii)
measures to identify, assess, manage and monitor cyber security risk which shall also
include various types of security controls for ensuring cyber resiliency along with
processes for training and awareness of employees / stakeholders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include various types of security controls for ensuring cyber resiliency along with processes for training and awareness of employees / stakehold

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare a distinct board approved cyber crisis management plan (ccmp) to detect, contain, respond and recover from cyber threats and cyber attacks
controls.control_description:
The PSO shall prepare a distinct Board approved Cyber Crisis Management Plan (CCMP)
to detect, contain, respond and recover from cyber threats and cyber attacks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare a distinct board approved cyber crisis management plan (ccmp) to detect, contain, respond and recover from cyber threats and cyber attacks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred for guidance
controls.control_description:
Relevant
guidelines from CERT-In / National Critical Information Infrastructure Protection Centre
(NCIIPC) / IDRBT and other agencies may be referred for guidance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred for guidance

controls.control_objective: To ensure entrust the responsibility and accountability for implementing the is policy and the cyber resilience framework as well as for continuously assessing
controls.control_description:
The Board shall entrust the responsibility and accountability for implementing the IS policy
and the cyber resilience framework as well as for continuously assessing the overall IS
posture of PSO to a senior level executive with expertise in areas of information security
including cyber security.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to entrust the responsibility and accountability for implementing the is policy and the cyber resilience framework as well as for continuously assessing

controls.control_objective: To ensure define appropriate key risk indicators (kris) to identify potential risk events and key performance indicators (kpis) to assess the effectiveness of s
controls.control_description:
The PSO shall define appropriate Key Risk Indicators (KRIs) to identify potential risk
events and Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to assess the effectiveness of security
controls.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to define appropriate key risk indicators (kris) to identify potential risk events and key performance indicators (kpis) to assess the effectiveness of s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be continuously monitored by the sub-committee of the board referred to in paragraph 7
controls.control_description:
These KRIs and KPIs shall be continuously monitored by the sub-committee of
the Board referred to in paragraph 7.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be continuously monitored by the sub-committee of the board referred to in paragraph 7

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed before the sub-committee responsible for it oversight in the meeting due immediately after such report is available
controls.control_description:
IT assessment reports (such as system audit, VA / PT reports, etc.) shall be placed before
the sub-committee responsible for IT oversight in the meeting due immediately after such
report is available.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be placed before the sub-committee responsible for it oversight in the meeting due immediately after such report is available

controls.control_objective: To ensure , undertake a cyber risk assessment exercise relating to launch of new product / services / technologies or undertaking major changes to infrastructur
controls.control_description:
The PSO shall, undertake a cyber risk assessment exercise relating to launch of new
product / services / technologies or undertaking major changes to infrastructure or
processes of existing product / services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , undertake a cyber risk assessment exercise relating to launch of new product / services / technologies or undertaking major changes to infrastructur

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented under the oversight of the ciso or equivalent executive
controls.control_description:
Action points emanating from such assessment
shall be implemented under the oversight of the CISO or equivalent executive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented under the oversight of the ciso or equivalent executive

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain a record of all the key roles, information assets (applications, data, infrastructure, personnel, services, etc
controls.control_description:
(a) The PSO shall maintain a record of all the key roles, information assets (applications,
data, infrastructure, personnel, services, etc.), critical functions, processes and third-
party service providers, and classify and document their levels of usage, criticality
and business value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain a record of all the key roles, information assets (applications, data, infrastructure, personnel, services, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be created and maintained
controls.control_description:
(b) A complete process flow diagram of network resources, inter-connections and
dependencies, and data flows with other information assets, including any other third-
party systems, shall be created and maintained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be created and maintained

controls.control_objective: To ensure necessarily include an identifier, network address, asset location, asset owner name and end of life support (eols)
controls.control_description:
(c) Asset information shall necessarily include an identifier, network address, asset
location, asset owner name and End of Life Support (EoLS).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to necessarily include an identifier, network address, asset location, asset owner name and end of life support (eols)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assessed to evaluate risks associated with the continued use of the unsupported asset
controls.control_description:
All assets (hardware or
software) approaching EoLS shall be assessed to evaluate risks associated with the
continued use of the unsupported asset.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assessed to evaluate risks associated with the continued use of the unsupported asset

controls.control_objective: To ensure be established
controls.control_description:
(a) Policies, procedures and controls that address access privileges as well as
administration of access rights must be established.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be established

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assigned a digital identity, which shall be maintained and monitored till termination
controls.control_description:
(b) All individuals having access to the IT environment of the PSO shall be assigned a
digital identity, which shall be maintained and monitored till termination.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assigned a digital identity, which shall be maintained and monitored till termination

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deactivated and changed before they are rolled out to live environment
controls.control_description:
(c) Default authentication settings in systems / software / services shall be deactivated
and changed before they are rolled out to live environment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deactivated and changed before they are rolled out to live environment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on need-to-have, need-to-know and based on the principle of least privilege5
controls.control_description:
(d) Access to systems and different environments (development, test, production, etc.)
shall be based on need-to-have, need-to-know and based on the principle of least
privilege5.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on need-to-have, need-to-know and based on the principle of least privilege5

controls.control_objective: To ensure be with multi-factor authentication and tightly monitored
controls.control_description:
(e) The use of privileged accounts6 shall be with multi-factor authentication and tightly
monitored.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with multi-factor authentication and tightly monitored

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented
controls.control_description: Appropriate controls, including rotation policy, shall be implemented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place to ensure secure use of removable media and portable devices (eg
controls.control_description:
(f) Necessary security controls, including centralised mechanism to whitelist / blacklist,
shall be put in place to ensure secure use of removable media and portable devices
(eg.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place to ensure secure use of removable media and portable devices (eg

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in place
controls.control_description:
(g) In case of remote / work from home situations, adequate precautions, including multi-
factor authentication mechanism, shall be in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure define and implement procedures that limit, lock and terminate system and remote sessions after a pre-defined period of inactivity
controls.control_description:
(h) The PSO shall define and implement procedures that limit, lock and terminate system
and remote sessions after a pre-defined period of inactivity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to define and implement procedures that limit, lock and terminate system and remote sessions after a pre-defined period of inactivity

controls.control_objective: To ensure have physical and environmental safeguards, with periodic testing, to protect access to its information assets from natural disasters and other threat
controls.control_description:
(i) PSO shall have physical and environmental safeguards, with periodic testing, to
protect access to its information assets from natural disasters and other threats.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have physical and environmental safeguards, with periodic testing, to protect access to its information assets from natural disasters and other threat

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place the following measures to protect its network and systems from external threats:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place the following measures to protect its network and systems from external threats:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be configured and checked periodically for security rules
controls.control_description: (a) Network devices shall be configured and checked periodically for security rules;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be configured and checked periodically for security rules

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure proactive and centralised monitoring of comprehensive network and system logs collected and management of security incidents with effective too
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure proactive and centralised monitoring of comprehensive network and system logs collected and management of security incidents with effective too

controls.control_objective: To ensure be established
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be established

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented so as to prevent, detect and contain malware attacks by scanning all incoming data to prevent malware from being installed and infectin
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented so as to prevent, detect and contain malware attacks by scanning all incoming data to prevent malware from being installed and infectin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be able to install or remove software, upgrade the operating system, or modify system or application configurations
controls.control_description: Such user may be able to install or remove software, upgrade the operating system, or modify system or application configurations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be able to install or remove software, upgrade the operating system, or modify system or application configurations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be incorporated into is systems to efficiently monitor the network traffic and filter the flow of data in and out of the organisation
controls.control_description:
(e) Multi-layered boundary defences shall be incorporated into IS systems to efficiently
monitor the network traffic and filter the flow of data in and out of the organisation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be incorporated into is systems to efficiently monitor the network traffic and filter the flow of data in and out of the organisation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adequate measures to detect and remedy unusual activities / events
controls.control_description: There shall be adequate measures to detect and remedy unusual activities / events;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adequate measures to detect and remedy unusual activities / events

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made based on role, location and environment (production, testing, development, etc
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made based on role, location and environment (production, testing, development, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in place to ensure that only permitted applications and services with validated needs are running
controls.control_description:
Whitelisting solutions shall be in place to ensure that only permitted
applications and services with validated needs are running.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in place to ensure that only permitted applications and services with validated needs are running

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be ensured with constant monitoring
controls.control_description:
Whitelisting of ports may
also be ensured with constant monitoring;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be ensured with constant monitoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow devices (such as laptop, desktop, mobile, etc
controls.control_description:
(g) PSOs shall allow devices (such as laptop, desktop, mobile, etc.) to be connected to
its network only after ensuring that they meet the prescribed security measures /
requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow devices (such as laptop, desktop, mobile, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow a 'secure by design' approach such as secure-software development life cycle (s-sdlc) for design and development of products / services and ens
controls.control_description:
(a) The PSO shall follow a 'secure by design' approach such as Secure-Software
Development Life Cycle (S-SDLC) for design and development of products / services
and ensure that no security weaknesses are introduced during the build process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to follow a 'secure by design' approach such as secure-software development life cycle (s-sdlc) for design and development of products / services and ens

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement a multi-tier application architecture, that ensures segregation of database layer from other layers, while developing digital payment produc
controls.control_description:
(b) The PSO shall implement a multi-tier application architecture, that ensures
segregation of database layer from other layers, while developing digital payment
products and services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement a multi-tier application architecture, that ensures segregation of database layer from other layers, while developing digital payment produc

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to procured products / services as well
controls.control_description: (c) The ASLC guidelines shall apply to procured products / services as well.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to procured products / services as well

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain the source code of all critical applications procured from third-party vendors
controls.control_description:
Further, the
PSO shall obtain the source code of all critical applications procured from third-party
vendors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain the source code of all critical applications procured from third-party vendors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an escrow arrangement for the source code to ensure continuity of services
controls.control_description:
In case obtaining source code is not possible, there shall be an escrow
arrangement for the source code to ensure continuity of services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an escrow arrangement for the source code to ensure continuity of services

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all its applications are subjected to rigorous security testing, such as source code review, va, pt, etc
controls.control_description:
(a) The PSO shall ensure that all its applications are subjected to rigorous security
testing, such as source code review, VA, PT, etc., through qualified professionals at
adequate frequency (at least on annual basis) in authenticated mode.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all its applications are subjected to rigorous security testing, such as source code review, va, pt, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain a certificate from the application developer stating that the application is free of vulnerabilities, malwares and any covert channels in the c
controls.control_description:
(b) If the source code is not owned by the PSO, it shall obtain a certificate from the
application developer stating that the application is free of vulnerabilities, malwares
and any covert channels in the code.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain a certificate from the application developer stating that the application is free of vulnerabilities, malwares and any covert channels in the c

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained for any changes to source code
controls.control_description:
Fresh certificate shall be obtained for any
changes to source code.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained for any changes to source code

controls.control_objective: To ensure be resolved in a time bound manner
controls.control_description: (c) Deficiencies reported in the security testing shall be resolved in a time bound manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be resolved in a time bound manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure necessarily be reported to the board sub-committee responsible for it oversight along with detailed analysis for recurrence and resolution
controls.control_description:
Any recurring observation shall necessarily be reported to the Board sub-committee
responsible for IT oversight along with detailed analysis for recurrence and resolution.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to necessarily be reported to the board sub-committee responsible for it oversight along with detailed analysis for recurrence and resolution

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done only after conducting security audits, including va / pt, and addressing the resultant observations
controls.control_description:
(d) Any deployment or redeployment of new or existing services supporting critical
functions, applications and infrastructure components must be done only after
conducting security audits, including VA / PT, and addressing the resultant
observations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done only after conducting security audits, including va / pt, and addressing the resultant observations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the framework for outsourcing of payment and settlement- related activities by psos issued by rbi vide circular dated august 03, 2021 (up
controls.control_description:
Vendor Risk Management
The PSO shall be guided by the Framework for Outsourcing of Payment and Settlement-
related Activities by PSOs issued by RBI vide circular dated August 03, 2021 (updated
from time to time).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be guided by the framework for outsourcing of payment and settlement- related activities by psos issued by rbi vide circular dated august 03, 2021 (up

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place necessary security controls for preventing infiltration into its network from vendor environments
controls.control_description:
(a) The PSO shall put in place necessary security controls for preventing infiltration into
its network from vendor environments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place necessary security controls for preventing infiltration into its network from vendor environments

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the relevant legal and regulatory requirements relating to geographical location of infrastructure and processing, storage and usage of data
controls.control_description:
(b) The PSO shall adhere to the relevant legal and regulatory requirements relating to
geographical location of infrastructure and processing, storage and usage of data
and also ensure compliance by their vendors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the relevant legal and regulatory requirements relating to geographical location of infrastructure and processing, storage and usage of data

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain certified assurance from an independent auditor on the vendor's cyber resilience capabilities
controls.control_description:
(c) In case of vendors involved in critical processes and activities7, the PSO shall obtain
certified assurance from an independent auditor on the vendor's cyber resilience
capabilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain certified assurance from an independent auditor on the vendor's cyber resilience capabilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive data leak prevention policy for confidentiality, integrity, availability and protection of business and customer informat
controls.control_description:
(a) The PSO shall put in place a comprehensive data leak prevention policy for
confidentiality, integrity, availability and protection of business and customer
information (both in transit and at rest) in respect of data available with it or at vendor
managed facilities, commensurate with the criticality and sensitivity of the information
held / transmitted.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive data leak prevention policy for confidentiality, integrity, availability and protection of business and customer informat

controls.control_objective: To ensure employ suitable mechanism to ensure traceability and visibility of data assets
controls.control_description:
(b) The PSO shall employ suitable mechanism to ensure traceability and visibility of data
assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to employ suitable mechanism to ensure traceability and visibility of data assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop and implement an information security management system (isms) based on applicable standards
controls.control_description:
(c) The PSO shall develop and implement an Information Security Management System
(ISMS) based on applicable standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop and implement an information security management system (isms) based on applicable standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure focus on secure handling, processing, storage and protection of data, in particular, personally identifiable information (pii)
controls.control_description:
(d) Application and database security controls shall focus on secure handling,
processing, storage and protection of data, in particular, Personally Identifiable
Information (PII).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to focus on secure handling, processing, storage and protection of data, in particular, personally identifiable information (pii)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be secured through either data or channel encryption or both
controls.control_description:
Data in transit and rest shall be secured through either data or
channel encryption or both.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be secured through either data or channel encryption or both

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to pci-dss guidelines and obtain pci-dss certification
controls.control_description:
(e) The PSO storing card (debit / credit / prepaid) data shall adhere to PCI-DSS
guidelines and obtain PCI-DSS certification.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adhere to pci-dss guidelines and obtain pci-dss certification

controls.control_objective: To ensure have necessary systems and procedures in place to periodically (at least on a half-yearly basis) test the backed-up data to ensure recovery without lo
controls.control_description:
(f) The PSO shall have necessary systems and procedures in place to periodically (at
least on a half-yearly basis) test the backed-up data to ensure recovery without loss
of transactions or audit-trails.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have necessary systems and procedures in place to periodically (at least on a half-yearly basis) test the backed-up data to ensure recovery without lo

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a documented policy and process to identify and implement patches to technology and software assets released by oems / others
controls.control_description:
(a) The PSO shall put in place a documented policy and process to identify and
implement patches to technology and software assets released by OEMs / others.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a documented policy and process to identify and implement patches to technology and software assets released by oems / others

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied to the relevant systems and applications within an appropriate time frame from their release
controls.control_description:
(b) Security patches shall be applied to the relevant systems and applications within an
appropriate time frame from their release.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied to the relevant systems and applications within an appropriate time frame from their release

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a mechanism to apply them immediately
controls.control_description:
In case of critical patches released to tackle
well-known / reported attacks, the PSO shall have a mechanism to apply them
immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a mechanism to apply them immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure be managed using robust change management processes and after ensuring that overall integrity of the it set-up is not compromised
controls.control_description:
(c) Any change to system, technology, application, source code, etc., shall be managed
using robust change management processes and after ensuring that overall integrity
of the IT set-up is not compromised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be managed using robust change management processes and after ensuring that overall integrity of the it set-up is not compromised

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented in production environment after testing and validating the same in other environments (e
controls.control_description:
(d) Patches and changes shall be implemented in production environment after testing
and validating the same in other environments (e.g.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented in production environment after testing and validating the same in other environments (e

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board approved incident response mechanism, which shall include provisions to promptly notify its senior management, relevant employees
controls.control_description:
(a) The PSO shall put in place a Board approved incident response mechanism, which
shall include provisions to promptly notify its senior management, relevant employees
and regulatory, supervisory and relevant public authorities, of cyber incidents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to put in place a board approved incident response mechanism, which shall include provisions to promptly notify its senior management, relevant employees

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate readiness to meet various incident scenarios based on situational awareness and potential impact, consistent communication and co-ordinati
controls.control_description:
(b) Response strategies shall incorporate readiness to meet various incident scenarios
based on situational awareness and potential impact, consistent communication and
co-ordination with stakeholders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate readiness to meet various incident scenarios based on situational awareness and potential impact, consistent communication and co-ordinati

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted to determine the impact and root cause of incidents
controls.control_description:
(c) Post-incident analysis, including forensic analysis (wherever necessary), shall be
conducted to determine the impact and root cause of incidents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted to determine the impact and root cause of incidents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken to avoid recurrence of similar incidents
controls.control_description:
Adequate measures
shall be taken to avoid recurrence of similar incidents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken to avoid recurrence of similar incidents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to rbi in the incident reporting format (annex 1) within 6 hours of detection
controls.control_description:
(d) Unusual incidents like cyber-attacks, outage of critical system / infrastructure, internal
fraud, settlement delay, etc., shall be reported to RBI in the Incident Reporting Format
(Annex 1) within 6 hours of detection.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to rbi in the incident reporting format (annex 1) within 6 hours of detection

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reported to cert-in
controls.control_description: Any cyber security incident shall also be reported to CERT-In.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reported to cert-in

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop a bcp based on different cyber threat scenarios, including extreme but plausible events to which it may be exposed
controls.control_description:
(a) The PSO shall develop a BCP based on different cyber threat scenarios, including
extreme but plausible events to which it may be exposed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop a bcp based on different cyber threat scenarios, including extreme but plausible events to which it may be exposed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed at least once a year and include a comprehensive cyber incident response, resumption and recovery plan, to manage cyber security events or
controls.control_description:
It shall be reviewed at least
once a year and include a comprehensive cyber incident response, resumption and
recovery plan, to manage cyber security events or incidents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed at least once a year and include a comprehensive cyber incident response, resumption and recovery plan, to manage cyber security events or

controls.control_objective: To ensure be designed to enable rapid recovery from any adverse event and facilitate safe resumption of critical operations aligned with recovery time objective
controls.control_description:
(b) The BCP shall be designed to enable rapid recovery from any adverse event and
facilitate safe resumption of critical operations aligned with Recovery Time Objective
(RTO) and Recovery Point Objective (RPO) while ensuring the security of processes
and data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be designed to enable rapid recovery from any adverse event and facilitate safe resumption of critical operations aligned with recovery time objective

controls.control_objective: To ensure strive to achieve near-zero rpo
controls.control_description: (c) The PSO shall strive to achieve near-zero RPO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strive to achieve near-zero rpo

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up a disaster recovery (dr) facility in a different seismic zone than the primary data centre (pdc)
controls.control_description:
(d) The PSO shall set up a Disaster Recovery (DR) facility in a different seismic zone
than the Primary Data Centre (PDC).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set up a disaster recovery (dr) facility in a different seismic zone than the primary data centre (pdc)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a defined methodology for reconciliation of data so as to ensure that there is no data loss while resuming operations from the dr
controls.control_description:
There shall be a defined methodology for
reconciliation of data so as to ensure that there is no data loss while resuming
operations from the DR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a defined methodology for reconciliation of data so as to ensure that there is no data loss while resuming operations from the dr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted on a half-yearly or more frequent basis
controls.control_description: (e) DR drills shall be conducted on a half-yearly or more frequent basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted on a half-yearly or more frequent basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be analysed and the deficiency be rectified on urgent basis
controls.control_description:
Any divergence
from the RTO and RPO shall be analysed and the deficiency be rectified on urgent
basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be analysed and the deficiency be rectified on urgent basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place, inter-alia, the following measures:
controls.control_description:
(a) To safeguard applications against risks emanating from insecure APIs, the PSO shall
put in place, inter-alia, the following measures:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place, inter-alia, the following measures:

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to relevant standards and globally recognised frameworks on api security
controls.control_description:
(b) The PSO shall adhere to relevant standards and globally recognised frameworks on
API security.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to relevant standards and globally recognised frameworks on api security

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure periodic repeated training / awareness programs on information security issues for its employees and vendors managing its information assets
controls.control_description:
(a) The PSO shall ensure periodic repeated training / awareness programs on information
security issues for its employees and vendors managing its information assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure periodic repeated training / awareness programs on information security issues for its employees and vendors managing its information assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be operationalised
controls.control_description:
(b) A system of periodic evaluation of cyber security awareness amongst employees
shall be operationalised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be operationalised

controls.control_objective: To ensure be restricted / prohibited from accessing information assets
controls.control_description:
Employees with an awareness level below a benchmark
score may be restricted / prohibited from accessing information assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be restricted / prohibited from accessing information assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided training and sensitised on information security and cyber risks
controls.control_description:
(c) Board members and key senior management personnel shall be provided training
and sensitised on information security and cyber risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided training and sensitised on information security and cyber risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a cloud operation policy (as a part of board approved information security policy), highlighting, inter-alia, activities that can be loca
controls.control_description:
(a) The PSO subscribing to cloud services shall put in place a cloud operation policy (as
a part of board approved Information Security Policy), highlighting, inter-alia, activities
that can be located in cloud servers, clearly identified roles and responsibilities for
cloud service provider (CSP), data localisation, protection and recoverability
requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a cloud operation policy (as a part of board approved information security policy), highlighting, inter-alia, activities that can be loca

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that data pertaining to the pso is clearly segregated and stringent access control measures are implemented
controls.control_description:
(b) It shall be ensured that data pertaining to the PSO is clearly segregated and stringent
access control measures are implemented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be ensured that data pertaining to the pso is clearly segregated and stringent access control measures are implemented

controls.control_objective: To ensure be protected against data integrity and confidentiality risks, and against co-mingling of data
controls.control_description:
Multi-tenancy environments shall be
protected against data integrity and confidentiality risks, and against co-mingling of
data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be protected against data integrity and confidentiality risks, and against co-mingling of data

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the csp is subjected to periodic (at least annually) independent information and cyber security audits
controls.control_description:
(c) The PSO shall ensure that the CSP is subjected to periodic (at least annually)
independent information and cyber security audits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the csp is subjected to periodic (at least annually) independent information and cyber security audits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed annually by the board sub-committee responsible for it oversight
controls.control_description:
Such audit reports and the CSPs
overall performance, its cyber resilience capabilities shall be reviewed annually by the
Board sub-committee responsible for IT oversight.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed annually by the board sub-committee responsible for it oversight

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all payment transactions, including cash withdrawals, involving debit to the account conducted through electronic modes (bank accounts / debit cards / credit cards / ppis, etc.) are permitted only by validation through multi- factor authentication
controls.control_description:
(a) The PSO shall ensure that all payment transactions, including cash withdrawals,
involving debit to the account conducted through electronic modes (bank accounts /
debit cards / credit cards / PPIs, etc.) are permitted only by validation through multi-
factor authentication, except where explicitly permitted / relaxed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all payment transactions, including cash withdrawals, involving debit to the account conducted through electronic modes (bank accounts / debit cards / credit cards / ppis, etc.) are permitted only by validation through multi- factor authentication

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure secure configuration of its entire it infrastructure
controls.control_description: (b) The PSO shall ensure secure configuration of its entire IT infrastructure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure secure configuration of its entire it infrastructure

controls.control_objective: To ensure also equip its servers with adequate security measures so that unauthorised / spoofed transactions are not done and the authentication process is robu
controls.control_description:
It shall also
equip its servers with adequate security measures so that unauthorised / spoofed
transactions are not done and the authentication process is robust, secure and
centralised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also equip its servers with adequate security measures so that unauthorised / spoofed transactions are not done and the authentication process is robu

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a real-time / near real-time fraud monitoring solution to identify suspicious transactional behaviour and generate alerts
controls.control_description:
(c) The PSO shall put in place a real-time / near real-time fraud monitoring solution to
identify suspicious transactional behaviour and generate alerts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a real-time / near real-time fraud monitoring solution to identify suspicious transactional behaviour and generate alerts

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a manned facility to function on 24x7x365 basis for facilitating swift resolution of unauthorised / fraudulent transactions reported by customers
controls.control_description:
(d) The PSO shall have a manned facility to function on 24x7x365 basis for facilitating
swift resolution of unauthorised / fraudulent transactions reported by customers and
also to provide prompt response to Law Enforcement Agencies (LEAs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a manned facility to function on 24x7x365 basis for facilitating swift resolution of unauthorised / fraudulent transactions reported by customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a mechanism to capture, analyse, store and archive audit logs in a systematic manner
controls.control_description:
(e) The PSO shall put in place a mechanism to capture, analyse, store and archive audit
logs in a systematic manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a mechanism to capture, analyse, store and archive audit logs in a systematic manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide relevant information to uniquely identify the user that initiated an action, the action and parameters of that particular action
controls.control_description:
Log messages shall provide relevant information to
uniquely identify the user that initiated an action, the action and parameters of that
particular action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide relevant information to uniquely identify the user that initiated an action, the action and parameters of that particular action

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided on a controlled basis
controls.control_description: Access to log data shall be provided on a controlled basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided on a controlled basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be preserved for a period of at least five years
controls.control_description:
Audit
logs shall be preserved for a period of at least five years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be preserved for a period of at least five years

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the payment architecture operated by them is robust, scalable and commensurate with the transaction volumes
controls.control_description:
(f) The PSO shall ensure that the payment architecture operated by them is robust,
scalable and commensurate with the transaction volumes;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the payment architecture operated by them is robust, scalable and commensurate with the transaction volumes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed by the sub-committee of the board
controls.control_description:
this shall be reviewed by
the sub-committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed by the sub-committee of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure employ secure mail and messaging systems to ensure that inbound and outbound traffic through mail, messages or any other media are secure
controls.control_description:
(g) The PSO shall employ secure mail and messaging systems to ensure that inbound
and outbound traffic through mail, messages or any other media are secure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to employ secure mail and messaging systems to ensure that inbound and outbound traffic through mail, messages or any other media are secure

controls.control_objective: To ensure subscribe to anti-phishing / anti-rogue app services for identifying and taking down phishing websites / rogue applications
controls.control_description:
(h) The PSO shall subscribe to anti-phishing / anti-rogue app services for identifying and
taking down phishing websites / rogue applications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to subscribe to anti-phishing / anti-rogue app services for identifying and taking down phishing websites / rogue applications

controls.control_objective: To ensure , on an ongoing basis, either directly or through its participants and service providers, create public awareness on precautionary measures to safegua
controls.control_description:
(i) The PSO shall, on an ongoing basis, either directly or through its participants and
service providers, create public awareness on precautionary measures to safeguard
against frauds and cyber threats while using digital payment products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , on an ongoing basis, either directly or through its participants and service providers, create public awareness on precautionary measures to safegua

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable
controls.control_description:
Section IV
Digital Payment Security Measures / Controls
In addition to the extant instructions applicable to PSOs for digital payment transactions, the
following instructions shall also be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure facilitate its members / participants have mechanisms for online alerts based on various parameters such as failed transactions, transaction velocity
controls.control_description:
The PSO shall facilitate its members / participants have mechanisms for online alerts
based on various parameters such as failed transactions, transaction velocity, as well as
in case of new account parameters (eg., excessive activity), time zone, geo-location, IP
address origin (in respect of unusual patterns, prohibited zones / rogue IPs), behavioural
biometrics, transaction origination from point of compromise, transactions to mobile
wallets / mobile numbers / VPAs on whom vishing or other types of fraud are registered /
recorded, declined transactions, transactions with no approval code, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to facilitate its members / participants have mechanisms for online alerts based on various parameters such as failed transactions, transaction velocity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured -
controls.control_description:
While sending SMS / e-mail alert or any other notification to customers, either by PSO or
payment system participants, the following shall be ensured -
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured -

controls.control_objective: To ensure mention merchant name (not the payment gateway / aggregator) and amount
controls.control_description:
(b) Online payment transactions shall mention merchant name (not the payment gateway
/ aggregator) and amount;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mention merchant name (not the payment gateway / aggregator) and amount

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the name is taken from the system of the entity maintaining the beneficiary account
controls.control_description:
The PSO shall ensure that the name is taken from the system of the entity
maintaining the beneficiary account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the name is taken from the system of the entity maintaining the beneficiary account

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the otp is mentioned at the end of the notification message and the message shall also refer the specific transaction
controls.control_description:
(c) In cases where the OTP is a factor of authentication, the PSO shall ensure that the
OTP is mentioned at the end of the notification message and the message shall also
refer the specific transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the otp is mentioned at the end of the notification message and the message shall also refer the specific transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide a facility on its mobile application / website that would enable customers, with necessary authentication, to identify / mark a fraudulent tra
controls.control_description:
The PSO shall provide a facility on its mobile application / website that would enable
customers, with necessary authentication, to identify / mark a fraudulent transaction for
seamless and immediate notification to the issuer of payment instrument.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide a facility on its mobile application / website that would enable customers, with necessary authentication, to identify / mark a fraudulent tra

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure facilitation of such mechanism by the system participants
controls.control_description:
It shall also
ensure facilitation of such mechanism by the system participants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure facilitation of such mechanism by the system participants

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the following security practices and risk mitigation measures and shall also ensure that the participants in its payment system comply wit
controls.control_description:
The PSO providing / facilitating / processing mobile payment services transactions shall
comply with the following security practices and risk mitigation measures and shall also
ensure that the participants in its payment system comply with these instructions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the following security practices and risk mitigation measures and shall also ensure that the participants in its payment system comply wit

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a mechanism to ensure that the mobile application is free from any anomalies or exceptions for which the application was not programmed
controls.control_description:
(a) PSO shall put in place a mechanism to ensure that the mobile application is free from
any anomalies or exceptions for which the application was not programmed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a mechanism to ensure that the mobile application is free from any anomalies or exceptions for which the application was not programmed

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an authenticated session, together with its encryption protocol, remains intact throughout an interaction with the customer
controls.control_description:
(b) The PSO shall ensure that an authenticated session, together with its encryption
protocol, remains intact throughout an interaction with the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an authenticated session, together with its encryption protocol, remains intact throughout an interaction with the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be terminated, and the affected transactions resolved or reversed out
controls.control_description:
In case of any
interference or if the customer closes the application, the session shall be terminated,
and the affected transactions resolved or reversed out.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be terminated, and the affected transactions resolved or reversed out

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure device binding9 / finger printing of mobile applications with the device and sim
controls.control_description:
(c) The PSO shall ensure device binding9 / finger printing of mobile applications with the
device and SIM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure device binding9 / finger printing of mobile applications with the device and sim

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure device binding is performed again
controls.control_description:
In case the mobile application remains unused beyond a policy
determined specified period, the PSO shall ensure device binding is performed again.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure device binding is performed again

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an online session on mobile application is automatically terminated after a fixed period of inactivity and customers are prompted to re-lo
controls.control_description:
(d) The PSO shall ensure that an online session on mobile application is automatically
terminated after a fixed period of inactivity and customers are prompted to re-login.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an online session on mobile application is automatically terminated after a fixed period of inactivity and customers are prompted to re-lo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a secure procedure to re-activate the access to blocked product / service
controls.control_description:
There
shall be a secure procedure to re-activate the access to blocked product / service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a secure procedure to re-activate the access to blocked product / service

controls.control_objective: To ensure be notified for failed log-in or authentication attempts, immediately
controls.control_description:
The customer shall be notified for failed log-in or authentication attempts,
immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be notified for failed log-in or authentication attempts, immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a control mechanism, to identify any presence of remote access applications (to the extent possible) and prohibit access to the mobile pa
controls.control_description:
(f) The PSO shall put in place a control mechanism, to identify any presence of remote
access applications (to the extent possible) and prohibit access to the mobile
payment application while the remote access is live.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a control mechanism, to identify any presence of remote access applications (to the extent possible) and prohibit access to the mobile pa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a cooling period of minimum 12 hours before allowing any payment transaction through online modes / channels
controls.control_description:
(g) Whenever there is a change in registered mobile number or email ID linked to the
payment instrument there shall be a cooling period of minimum 12 hours before
allowing any payment transaction through online modes / channels.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a cooling period of minimum 12 hours before allowing any payment transaction through online modes / channels

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that terminals installed at merchants for capturing card details for payments or otherwise are validated against the pci-p2pe program
controls.control_description:
The PSO shall ensure that terminals installed at merchants for capturing card details for
payments or otherwise are validated against the PCI-P2PE program;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that terminals installed at merchants for capturing card details for payments or otherwise are validated against the pci-p2pe program

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by the pci-pts program
controls.control_description:
PoS terminals with
PIN entry installed at the merchants for capturing card payments (including the double
swipe terminals) shall be approved by the PCI-PTS program.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by the pci-pts program

controls.control_objective: To ensure facilitate implementation of transaction limits at card, bank identification number (bin) as well as at card issuer level
controls.control_description:
The card networks shall facilitate implementation of transaction limits at card, Bank
Identification Number (BIN) as well as at card issuer level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to facilitate implementation of transaction limits at card, bank identification number (bin) as well as at card issuer level

controls.control_objective: To ensure mandatorily 9 the device binding shall be preferably implemented through a combination of hardware, software and service information
controls.control_description:
Such limits shall mandatorily
9 The device binding shall be preferably implemented through a combination of hardware, software and service information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to mandatorily 9 the device binding shall be preferably implemented through a combination of hardware, software and service information

controls.control_objective: To ensure institute an alert mechanism on a 24x7x365 basis, to be triggered to the card issuer in case of any suspicious incident
controls.control_description:
The card networks shall institute an alert
mechanism on a 24x7x365 basis, to be triggered to the card issuer in case of any
suspicious incident.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to institute an alert mechanism on a 24x7x365 basis, to be triggered to the card issuer in case of any suspicious incident

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that card details of the customers are stored in an encrypted form at any of their server locations
controls.control_description:
Card networks shall ensure that card details of the customers are
stored in an encrypted form at any of their server locations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that card details of the customers are stored in an encrypted form at any of their server locations

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that processing of the card details in readable format is performed in a secure manner
controls.control_description:
They shall also ensure that
processing of the card details in readable format is performed in a secure manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure that processing of the card details in readable format is performed in a secure manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place suitable cooling period for funds transfer and cash withdrawal after such funds are electronically loaded on to the ppi
controls.control_description:
The PPI issuers - banks and non-banks - shall put in place suitable cooling period for
funds transfer and cash withdrawal after such funds are electronically loaded on to the
PPI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place suitable cooling period for funds transfer and cash withdrawal after such funds are electronically loaded on to the ppi
